segments.text: Can you afford to pay at least £2,000 more in tax?
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: And why won't Keir Starmer be straight with you about what he wants to do?
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: And if you are not certain about Labour, don't surrender to them.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: Don't vote for any other party.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: Vote Conservative.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_04

segments.text: That was a lie.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_05

segments.text: Thank you very much.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: He's been told not to repeat that lie and he's just done it.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: And this is your closing statement, Keir Starmer.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: Thank you very much.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: My message to you is simple.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: If you want your NHS back, you have to vote for it.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: If you want a growing economy, you have to vote for it.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: If you want more police on our streets, more teachers in our schools, you have to vote for it.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: If you want to end 14 years of chaos and rebuild our country, then that power is in your hands.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: On July the 4th, vote change, vote Labour.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: Thank you very much.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: And that brings to an end this last head-to-head debate of the election campaign.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: Thank you very much to our audience, especially to those who asked questions, but you've all been a really important part of this.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: And thank you also to the two contenders for Prime Minister.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: This is the last time you're scheduled to appear together in this way and to answer questions in this way.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: So we are grateful to both of you for taking part.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: Thank you very much.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: And the two men there, Sir Keir Starmer.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_08
